title: Four Ducks On A Pond
content:
Four ducks on a pond,
A grass-bank beyond,
A blue sky of spring,
White clouds on the wing;
What a little thing
To remember for years
To remember with tears!
meaning:
William Allingham's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Four Ducks On A Pond"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
